title: Kylian Mbappé’s France vs Iraq World Cup highlight gets xQc suspended as FIFA issues copyright strike
summary_full: xQc received a temporary Twitch suspension after showing a five-second Kylian Mbappé highlight from France’s World Cup match against Iraq. He said FIFA filed the DMCA claim, leading to a 24-48 hour ban. His explanation was later supported by reports from Dexerto, Sportskeeda and discussions on Reddit, all pointing to the same copyright issue.
